title: Phone not charging — first checks
diagnostic_questions: Have you tried another cable and wall adapter?
Does the port look clogged with lint?
Does the phone get unusually warm when plugged in?
solutions: Try a known-good cable and adapter
Try a different wall outlet or USB port
Inspect the port with a flashlight
escalation_conditions: device gets very hot while charging
notes: Do not poke metal tools deep into the port; use gentle dry air or soft brush if cleaning.

title: Safely cleaning a phone charging port
symptoms: cable only works at an angle
diagnostic_questions: Does wiggling the cable change charging behavior?
solutions: Use short bursts of canned air from the side
Gently sweep visible lint with a wooden toothpick—never metal picks
notes: Avoid liquids and sharp metal in the port.

title: Battery swelling warning
diagnostic_questions: Do you see deformation of the back or display?
solutions: Stop using and charging the device
Move it to a cool, non-flammable surface
Contact professional repair or manufacturer support
notes: Do not puncture or squeeze a swollen battery.

title: Phone runs hot during normal use
diagnostic_questions: Did this start after a software update?
Does it happen only while charging?
notes: Persistent idle overheating may need service.

title: Black screen but phone may be on
diagnostic_questions: Does the phone ring when called?
Any recent drops or water exposure?
solutions: Connect to a computer to see if recognized
notes: If force restart fails after charging, professional diagnosis is likely.

title: Mobile data or Wi‑Fi unstable
diagnostic_questions: Does another device work on the same Wi‑Fi?
Does toggling airplane mode help?
solutions: Reset network settings as last resort (erases saved Wi‑Fi)
notes: Document Wi‑Fi passwords before network reset.

title: Phone will not turn on
diagnostic_questions: Any charging indicator when plugged in?
Did it fall or get wet?
solutions: Charge 30–60 minutes with a known-good charger
Try recovery mode per OEM docs without erasing if possible
notes: Avoid repeated hard resets if the device is very hot.

title: Phone feels slow
diagnostic_questions: How much free storage is available?
Does safe mode help (Android)?
solutions: Clear app cache for heavy apps
notes: Factory reset is a last resort; back up first.

title: No sound from speaker or mic muffled
diagnostic_questions: Does audio work with wired/Bluetooth headphones?
Is Do Not Disturb off?
solutions: Clean speaker/mic grilles gently with soft brush
notes: Do not push liquids into openings.

title: Storage almost full
diagnostic_questions: Which categories use the most space in settings?
solutions: Empty deleted items in cloud galleries
notes: Keep several GB free for updates and stability.

title: Liquid exposure — safety-first steps
diagnostic_questions: Was it fresh water or other liquid?
Was it powered on when wet?
solutions: Power off immediately if safe to do so
Do not charge until fully dry
Place in dry airflow; avoid rice myths as sole fix
notes: Professional cleaning may be needed; do not microwave or heat the device.

title: Cracked screen — user safety
diagnostic_questions: Is the display bleeding or spreading black areas?
solutions: Apply a screen protector to reduce cuts
Use tempered glass or case until repair
notes: Avoid pressure on the display; professional replacement is typical.
